---
name: 🐛 Core Exception (Bug Report)
about: Log a client-side database error, caching issue, or UI deviation.
title: 'bug: [Short technical summary]'
labels: bug, untriaged
assignees: Stormynubee
---

```text
[ SYSTEM STATUS: CORE UNSTABLE ]
```

### 🚨 Description of Deviation
Describe what broke and how it deviates from expected PWA or IndexedDB architecture.

### 👣 Steps to Reproduce
1. Load PWA app '...'
2. Trigger action / database write '...'
3. Witness runtime failure '...'

### 🖥️ Environmental Sandbox Specifications
* **OS:** [e.g. iOS 17.4, Android 14, Windows 11]
* **Browser/Runtime:** [e.g. Safari iOS, Chrome Mobile, Chrome Desktop]
* **Local Commit/Version:** [e.g. v1.1.0, main branch]

### 📊 Raw Log Transcripts / Graphical Artifacts
If applicable, paste browser console logs, Dexie.js exception stacktraces, or screenshots of layout misalignments:
```text
// Paste log output here
```
